behaviors.description: Out-of-stock products are excluded even when they have high relevance scores.
behaviors.justification: Failure mode: module handoff/wiring error (inventory availability filter not applied, or applied before/after ranking incorrectly). Required setup: run the recommendation pipeline with inventory + ranking modules wired together and fixtures where an out-of-stock item has the top score. Rejected Unit because this bug can hide when filter logic is correct in isolation but omitted in pipeline composition. Rejected System/Agentic/Workflow because behavior text is output filtering only, with no real OS/network/subprocess dependency and no AI-model judgment step.
behaviors.test_description: Build an in-process integration test that loads user context and catalog fixtures containing at least one out-of-stock, high-score candidate. Execute recommendation generation end-to-end (within process) and assert no out-of-stock product appears in returned IDs.

behaviors.description: Blocked categories from user settings are excluded from recommendations.
behaviors.justification: Failure mode: module handoff/wiring error between user settings retrieval and category filter. Required setup: user profile/settings module + filtering module + recommendation assembly. Rejected Unit because a pure category-filter unit test misses failures where blocked settings are not loaded or mapped correctly into filtering. Rejected higher levels because behavior text does not require real infra or model-quality evaluation.
behaviors.test_description: Create fixtures with user settings blocking one or more categories and a catalog containing both blocked and allowed categories. Run pipeline with real in-process module wiring and assert all blocked-category products are absent.

behaviors.description: Products matching recent browsing patterns rank above products with no browsing signal.
behaviors.justification: Failure mode: module interaction error (browsing feature extraction/weighting not propagated into ranker) or ranking logic error at algorithm boundary. Required setup: feature input assembly plus ranker together. Rejected Unit because testing only scoring math can miss broken feature plumbing. Rejected Agentic because this is deterministic ranking logic, not non-deterministic LLM/model quality judgment in the spec text.
behaviors.test_description: Use controlled fixtures with identical products except browsing-signal features. Run recommendation generation through feature-building + ranking modules and assert higher rank for browsing-matched products.

behaviors.description: Pagination returns the correct page with stable ordering when data is unchanged.
behaviors.justification: Failure mode: module handoff/wiring error between sorting and pagination (unstable sort key, page slicing mismatch). Required setup: ranking + ordering + pagination components in one pipeline execution repeated twice. Rejected Unit because isolated paginator tests miss instability introduced by upstream ordering/tie-break integration. Rejected System because no real OS/network/subprocess condition is required by behavior text.
behaviors.test_description: Generate recommendations on fixed dataset/state, request page 2 twice, and assert identical ordered IDs and expected boundaries (offset/limit). Include tie-score cases to catch unstable ordering.

behaviors.description: At least one recommendation comes from an unseen category (serendipity requirement).
behaviors.justification: Failure mode: algorithm/business-rule integration error where diversity injection step is not applied after relevance ranking. Required setup: full in-process recommendation pipeline with browsing-history context and category diversity constraint enabled. Rejected Unit because isolated diversity helper tests can pass while orchestration drops the rule. Rejected Agentic because requirement is a deterministic policy constraint in the behavior text, not subjective AI output quality.
behaviors.test_description: Construct a user history concentrated in one category and a catalog spanning multiple categories. Run recommendations and assert at least one top-N result belongs to a category absent from user browsing history.

behaviors.description: Cold-start users receive popularity-based recommendations, not empty results.
behaviors.justification: Failure mode: fallback-path wiring error (no-history detection not triggering popularity source). Required setup: recommendation service with history lookup + fallback popularity provider wired together. Rejected Unit because a fallback function unit test misses failures where no-history condition is never reached in composed service. Rejected System since behavior text does not require real HTTP/subprocess/OS behavior.
behaviors.test_description: Run pipeline for a user fixture with no purchases/browsing. Assert non-empty output and that selected items correspond to popularity ordering fixture used by fallback provider.

behaviors.description: Click tracking stores correct product ID, list position, and timestamp per interaction.
behaviors.justification: Failure mode: module handoff error between UI/event payload mapping and tracking persistence schema. Required setup: click-event ingestion + tracker service + local persistence with controlled clock. Rejected Unit because mapper/persistence functions can pass separately while combined event contract is wrong. Rejected System because local in-process DB/clock injection is sufficient; no real external infra required by behavior text.
behaviors.test_description: Emit a recommendation click event with known product ID and position, freeze/inject time, persist through tracking pipeline, and assert stored record fields exactly match expected values.

behaviors.description: Recommendation generation remains under 200ms for a 100,000-product catalog.
behaviors.justification: Failure mode: performance/regression at multi-module algorithm boundary (filtering/ranking/pagination composition too slow). Required setup: in-process benchmark/integration performance test with realistic 100k fixture and warm-up/controlled environment. Rejected Unit because isolated function microbenchmarks miss end-to-end pipeline overhead. Considered System, but behavior text says recommendation generation latency and does not require real HTTP/network/subprocess/OS event semantics; in-process wired modules are the minimum setup.
behaviors.test_description: Run timed integration benchmark on full recommendation pipeline using a 100k-product dataset and representative user state. Measure p95 (or defined metric) over repeated runs and assert it stays <200ms under controlled test conditions.

behaviors.description: After purchase, that product is deprioritized in later recommendation requests.
behaviors.justification: Failure mode: state-propagation wiring error between purchase event update and subsequent ranking features. Required setup: purchase write path + recommendation read/rank path across two sequential requests. Rejected Unit because isolated reprioritization logic misses event/state handoff bugs. Rejected higher levels because no real external infra or agentic model quality dependency is specified.
behaviors.test_description: Generate baseline recommendations, record rank of product X, apply purchase event for X, regenerate recommendations, and assert X rank worsens (or drops) per policy with same remaining user state.

behaviors.description: With unchanged user state, repeated recommendation requests return the same ranked list.
behaviors.justification: Failure mode: nondeterministic module interaction (unstable tie-breaks, unordered collection iteration, cache variance) across full pipeline. Required setup: fixed state + repeated pipeline runs through same module wiring. Rejected Unit because deterministic behavior can fail only when multiple stages compose and preserve ordering. Rejected Agentic because behavior text expects deterministic outputs and does not depend on non-deterministic LLM/ML inference quality.
behaviors.test_description: Execute recommendation generation twice (or more) for identical user/catalog state with no intervening events and assert exact ordered list equality across runs.
